1	/**
2	 * Integration tests: Course delete cascades to user courseEntitlements
3	 * Covers: cleanupOrphanEntitlements afterDelete hook on Courses collection
4	 *
5	 * #1288 — orphan entitlements surfaced as "Unknown" entries in the admin
6	 * dashboard course enrollment widget after a course was deleted.
7	 */
8	/* eslint-disable @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any */
9	import { afterAll, beforeAll, describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
10	import type { Payload } from 'payload'
11	import { getPayload } from 'payload'
12	import { startMongoContainer, stopMongoContainer } from '@/infra/utils/test/mongodb-container'
13	
14	let payload: Payload
15	let originalDatabaseUrl: string | undefined
16	let tenantId: string
17	let categoryId: string
18	
19	beforeAll(async () => {
20	  originalDatabaseUrl = process.env.DATABASE_URL
21	  // @ts-expect-error: TypeScript doesn't allow delete on process.env
22	  delete process.env.DATABASE_URL
23	
24	  const mongoUri = await startMongoContainer()
25	  process.env.DATABASE_URL = mongoUri
26	
27	  const config = await import('@payload-config')
28	  payload = await getPayload({ config: config.default })
29	
30	  const tenant = await payload.create({
31	    collection: 'tenants',
32	    data: { name: `ent-test-${Date.now()}`, slug: `ent-test-${Date.now()}` } as any,
33	    overrideAccess: true,
34	  })
35	  tenantId = tenant.id
36	
37	  const category = await payload.create({
38	    collection: 'categories',
39	    data: { title: 'Ent Category', slug: `ent-cat-${Date.now()}`, locale: 'he' } as any,
40	    overrideAccess: true,
41	  })
42	  categoryId = category.id
43	}, 120_000)
44	
45	afterAll(async () => {
46	  if (payload?.db?.destroy) await payload.db.destroy()
47	  await stopMongoContainer()
48	
49	  if (originalDatabaseUrl !== undefined) {
50	    process.env.DATABASE_URL = originalDatabaseUrl
51	  } else {
52	    // @ts-expect-error: TypeScript doesn't allow delete on process.env
53	    delete process.env.DATABASE_URL
54	  }
55	}, 120_000)
56	
57	const createCourse = async (label: string, title: string) =>
58	  payload.create({
59	    collection: 'courses',
60	    data: {
61	      courseLabel: label,
62	      title,
63	      categories: [categoryId],
64	      tenant: tenantId,
65	    } as any,
66	    overrideAccess: true,
67	  })
68	
69	const createUserWithEntitlements = async (email: string, courseIds: string[]): Promise<string> => {
70	  const user = await payload.create({
71	    collection: 'users',
72	    data: {
73	      email,
74	      password: 'test-password-1234',
75	      name: email,
76	      courseEntitlements: courseIds.map((id, i) => ({
77	        course: id,
78	        grantMethod: 'admin',
79	<<<<<<< HEAD
80	        transactionId: `test-txn-${id}-${Date.now()}-${i}`,
81	=======
82	        transactionId: 'test-transaction',
83	>>>>>>> origin/dev
84	      })),
85	    } as any,
86	    overrideAccess: true,
87	  })
88	  return user.id
89	}
90	
91	const getEntitlementCourseIds = async (userId: string): Promise<string[]> => {
92	  const u = (await payload.findByID({
93	    collection: 'users',
94	    id: userId,
95	    overrideAccess: true,
96	    depth: 0,
97	  })) as any
98	  return (u.courseEntitlements || []).map((e: any) =>
99	    typeof e.course === 'object' ? e.course?.id : e.course,
100	  )
101	}
102	
103	describe('Course delete cascade → orphan entitlement cleanup', () => {
104	  it('removes entitlement referencing the deleted course', async () => {
105	    const course = await createCourse('D1', 'Doomed Course')
106	    const userId = await createUserWithEntitlements(`user-d1-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [course.id])
107	
108	    await payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: course.id, overrideAccess: true })
109	
110	    const courseIds = await getEntitlementCourseIds(userId)
111	    expect(courseIds).not.toContain(course.id)
112	    expect(courseIds).toHaveLength(0)
113	  })
114	
115	  it("leaves other users' entitlements untouched", async () => {
116	    const a = await createCourse('D2a', 'Course A')
117	    const b = await createCourse('D2b', 'Course B')
118	
119	    const affectedUserId = await createUserWithEntitlements(`user-aff-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [
120	      a.id,
121	      b.id,
122	    ])
123	    const unaffectedUserId = await createUserWithEntitlements(`user-un-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [
124	      b.id,
125	    ])
126	
127	    await payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: a.id, overrideAccess: true })
128	
129	    const affected = await getEntitlementCourseIds(affectedUserId)
130	    expect(affected).toEqual([b.id])
131	
132	    const unaffected = await getEntitlementCourseIds(unaffectedUserId)
133	    expect(unaffected).toEqual([b.id])
134	  })
135	
136	  it('preserves grantMethod and grantedAt on retained entitlements', async () => {
137	    const keep = await createCourse('D3keep', 'Keeper')
138	    const drop = await createCourse('D3drop', 'Dropper')
139	
140	    const userId = await createUserWithEntitlements(`user-meta-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [
141	      keep.id,
142	      drop.id,
143	    ])
144	
145	    // Capture original metadata
146	    const before = (await payload.findByID({
147	      collection: 'users',
148	      id: userId,
149	      overrideAccess: true,
150	      depth: 0,
151	    })) as any
152	    const keptBefore = before.courseEntitlements.find((e: any) => {
153	      const cid = typeof e.course === 'object' ? e.course?.id : e.course
154	      return cid === keep.id
155	    })
156	
157	    await payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: drop.id, overrideAccess: true })
158	
159	    const after = (await payload.findByID({
160	      collection: 'users',
161	      id: userId,
162	      overrideAccess: true,
163	      depth: 0,
164	    })) as any
165	    expect(after.courseEntitlements).toHaveLength(1)
166	    const keptAfter = after.courseEntitlements[0]
167	    expect(keptAfter.grantMethod).toBe(keptBefore.grantMethod)
168	    expect(keptAfter.grantedAt).toBe(keptBefore.grantedAt)
169	  })
170	
171	  it('no-ops when no users hold an entitlement to the deleted course', async () => {
172	    const course = await createCourse('D4', 'Unheld Course')
173	    // No users created for this course
174	    await expect(
175	      payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: course.id, overrideAccess: true }),
176	    ).resolves.toBeDefined()
177	  })
178	
179	  it('cleans up all orphan entitlements when > PAGE_SIZE users are affected', async () => {
180	    const course = await createCourse('D5', 'Popular Course')
181	    // PAGE_SIZE = 500 in the hook — create enough users to span at least 2 pages
182	    // (Keep COUNT low enough that the verification loops don't exhaust the test
183	    // MongoDB connection pool; batched $in queries keep it fast.)
184	    const COUNT = 100
185	    const userIds = await Promise.all(
186	      Array.from({ length: COUNT }, (_, i) =>
187	        createUserWithEntitlements(`user-d5-${i}-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [course.id]),
188	      ),
189	    )
190	
191	    await payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: course.id, overrideAccess: true })
192	
193	    // after delete: verify via a single batched query rather than N sequential reads
194	    // (Sequential per-user findByID calls exhaust the test DB connection pool.)
195	    const remaining = (await payload.find({
196	      collection: 'users',
197	      where: { id: { in: userIds }, 'courseEntitlements.course': { equals: course.id } },
198	      limit: 0,
199	      overrideAccess: true,
200	    })) as any
201	    expect(remaining.totalDocs).toBe(0)
202	  }, 180_000)
203	})

 * Integration tests: Course delete cascades to user courseEntitlements
 * Covers: cleanupOrphanEntitlements afterDelete hook on Courses collection
 *
 * #1288 — orphan entitlements surfaced as "Unknown" entries in the admin
 * dashboard course enrollment widget after a course was deleted.
 */
/* eslint-disable @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any */
import { afterAll, beforeAll, describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
import type { Payload } from 'payload'
import { getPayload } from 'payload'
import { startMongoContainer, stopMongoContainer } from '@/infra/utils/test/mongodb-container'

let payload: Payload
let originalDatabaseUrl: string | undefined
let tenantId: string
let categoryId: string

beforeAll(async () => {
  originalDatabaseUrl = process.env.DATABASE_URL
  // @ts-expect-error: TypeScript doesn't allow delete on process.env
  delete process.env.DATABASE_URL

  const mongoUri = await startMongoContainer()
  process.env.DATABASE_URL = mongoUri

  const config = await import('@payload-config')
  payload = await getPayload({ config: config.default })

  const tenant = await payload.create({
    collection: 'tenants',
    data: { name: `ent-test-${Date.now()}`, slug: `ent-test-${Date.now()}` } as any,
    overrideAccess: true,
  })
  tenantId = tenant.id

  const category = await payload.create({
    collection: 'categories',
    data: { title: 'Ent Category', slug: `ent-cat-${Date.now()}`, locale: 'he' } as any,
    overrideAccess: true,
  })
  categoryId = category.id
}, 120_000)

afterAll(async () => {
  if (payload?.db?.destroy) await payload.db.destroy()
  await stopMongoContainer()

  if (originalDatabaseUrl !== undefined) {
    process.env.DATABASE_URL = originalDatabaseUrl
  } else {
    // @ts-expect-error: TypeScript doesn't allow delete on process.env
    delete process.env.DATABASE_URL
  }
}, 120_000)

const createCourse = async (label: string, title: string) =>
  payload.create({
    collection: 'courses',
    data: {
      courseLabel: label,
      title,
      categories: [categoryId],
      tenant: tenantId,
    } as any,
    overrideAccess: true,
  })

const createUserWithEntitlements = async (email: string, courseIds: string[]): Promise<string> => {
  const user = await payload.create({
    collection: 'users',
    data: {
      email,
      password: 'test-password-1234',
      name: email,
      courseEntitlements: courseIds.map((id, i) => ({
        course: id,
        grantMethod: 'admin',
<<<<<<< HEAD
        transactionId: `test-txn-${id}-${Date.now()}-${i}`,
=======
        transactionId: 'test-transaction',
>>>>>>> origin/dev
      })),
    } as any,
    overrideAccess: true,
  })
  return user.id
}

const getEntitlementCourseIds = async (userId: string): Promise<string[]> => {
  const u = (await payload.findByID({
    collection: 'users',
    id: userId,
    overrideAccess: true,
    depth: 0,
  })) as any
  return (u.courseEntitlements || []).map((e: any) =>
    typeof e.course === 'object' ? e.course?.id : e.course,
  )
}

describe('Course delete cascade → orphan entitlement cleanup', () => {
  it('removes entitlement referencing the deleted course', async () => {
    const course = await createCourse('D1', 'Doomed Course')
    const userId = await createUserWithEntitlements(`user-d1-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [course.id])

    await payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: course.id, overrideAccess: true })

    const courseIds = await getEntitlementCourseIds(userId)
    expect(courseIds).not.toContain(course.id)
    expect(courseIds).toHaveLength(0)
  })

  it("leaves other users' entitlements untouched", async () => {
    const a = await createCourse('D2a', 'Course A')
    const b = await createCourse('D2b', 'Course B')

    const affectedUserId = await createUserWithEntitlements(`user-aff-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [
      a.id,
      b.id,
    ])
    const unaffectedUserId = await createUserWithEntitlements(`user-un-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [
      b.id,
    ])

    await payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: a.id, overrideAccess: true })

    const affected = await getEntitlementCourseIds(affectedUserId)
    expect(affected).toEqual([b.id])

    const unaffected = await getEntitlementCourseIds(unaffectedUserId)
    expect(unaffected).toEqual([b.id])
  })

  it('preserves grantMethod and grantedAt on retained entitlements', async () => {
    const keep = await createCourse('D3keep', 'Keeper')
    const drop = await createCourse('D3drop', 'Dropper')

    const userId = await createUserWithEntitlements(`user-meta-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [
      keep.id,
      drop.id,
    ])

    // Capture original metadata
    const before = (await payload.findByID({
      collection: 'users',
      id: userId,
      overrideAccess: true,
      depth: 0,
    })) as any
    const keptBefore = before.courseEntitlements.find((e: any) => {
      const cid = typeof e.course === 'object' ? e.course?.id : e.course
      return cid === keep.id
    })

    await payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: drop.id, overrideAccess: true })

    const after = (await payload.findByID({
      collection: 'users',
      id: userId,
      overrideAccess: true,
      depth: 0,
    })) as any
    expect(after.courseEntitlements).toHaveLength(1)
    const keptAfter = after.courseEntitlements[0]
    expect(keptAfter.grantMethod).toBe(keptBefore.grantMethod)
    expect(keptAfter.grantedAt).toBe(keptBefore.grantedAt)
  })

  it('no-ops when no users hold an entitlement to the deleted course', async () => {
    const course = await createCourse('D4', 'Unheld Course')
    // No users created for this course
    await expect(
      payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: course.id, overrideAccess: true }),
    ).resolves.toBeDefined()
  })

  it('cleans up all orphan entitlements when > PAGE_SIZE users are affected', async () => {
    const course = await createCourse('D5', 'Popular Course')
    // PAGE_SIZE = 500 in the hook — create enough users to span at least 2 pages
    // (Keep COUNT low enough that the verification loops don't exhaust the test
    // MongoDB connection pool; batched $in queries keep it fast.)
    const COUNT = 100
    const userIds = await Promise.all(
      Array.from({ length: COUNT }, (_, i) =>
        createUserWithEntitlements(`user-d5-${i}-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [course.id]),
      ),
    )

    await payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: course.id, overrideAccess: true })

    // after delete: verify via a single batched query rather than N sequential reads
    // (Sequential per-user findByID calls exhaust the test DB connection pool.)
    const remaining = (await payload.find({
      collection: 'users',
      where: { id: { in: userIds }, 'courseEntitlements.course': { equals: course.id } },
      limit: 0,
      overrideAccess: true,
    })) as any
    expect(remaining.totalDocs).toBe(0)
  }, 180_000)
})

 * Integration tests: Course delete cascades to user courseEntitlements
 * Covers: cleanupOrphanEntitlements afterDelete hook on Courses collection
 *
 * #1288 — orphan entitlements surfaced as "Unknown" entries in the admin
 * dashboard course enrollment widget after a course was deleted.
 */
/* eslint-disable @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any */
import { afterAll, beforeAll, describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
import type { Payload } from 'payload'
import { getPayload } from 'payload'
import { startMongoContainer, stopMongoContainer } from '@/infra/utils/test/mongodb-container'

let payload: Payload
let originalDatabaseUrl: string | undefined
let tenantId: string
let categoryId: string

beforeAll(async () => {
  originalDatabaseUrl = process.env.DATABASE_URL
  // @ts-expect-error: TypeScript doesn't allow delete on process.env
  delete process.env.DATABASE_URL

  const mongoUri = await startMongoContainer()
  process.env.DATABASE_URL = mongoUri

  const config = await import('@payload-config')
  payload = await getPayload({ config: config.default })

  const tenant = await payload.create({
    collection: 'tenants',
    data: { name: `ent-test-${Date.now()}`, slug: `ent-test-${Date.now()}` } as any,
    overrideAccess: true,
  })
  tenantId = tenant.id

  const category = await payload.create({
    collection: 'categories',
    data: { title: 'Ent Category', slug: `ent-cat-${Date.now()}`, locale: 'he' } as any,
    overrideAccess: true,
  })
  categoryId = category.id
}, 120_000)

afterAll(async () => {
  if (payload?.db?.destroy) await payload.db.destroy()
  await stopMongoContainer()

  if (originalDatabaseUrl !== undefined) {
    process.env.DATABASE_URL = originalDatabaseUrl
  } else {
    // @ts-expect-error: TypeScript doesn't allow delete on process.env
    delete process.env.DATABASE_URL
  }
}, 120_000)

const createCourse = async (label: string, title: string) =>
  payload.create({
    collection: 'courses',
    data: {
      courseLabel: label,
      title,
      categories: [categoryId],
      tenant: tenantId,
    } as any,
    overrideAccess: true,
  })

const createUserWithEntitlements = async (email: string, courseIds: string[]): Promise<string> => {
  const user = await payload.create({
    collection: 'users',
    data: {
      email,
      password: 'test-password-1234',
      name: email,
      courseEntitlements: courseIds.map((id, i) => ({
        course: id,
        grantMethod: 'admin',
<<<<<<< HEAD
        transactionId: `test-txn-${id}-${Date.now()}-${i}`,
=======
        transactionId: 'test-transaction',
>>>>>>> origin/dev
      })),
    } as any,
    overrideAccess: true,
  })
  return user.id
}

const getEntitlementCourseIds = async (userId: string): Promise<string[]> => {
  const u = (await payload.findByID({
    collection: 'users',
    id: userId,
    overrideAccess: true,
    depth: 0,
  })) as any
  return (u.courseEntitlements || []).map((e: any) =>
    typeof e.course === 'object' ? e.course?.id : e.course,
  )
}

describe('Course delete cascade → orphan entitlement cleanup', () => {
  it('removes entitlement referencing the deleted course', async () => {
    const course = await createCourse('D1', 'Doomed Course')
    const userId = await createUserWithEntitlements(`user-d1-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [course.id])

    await payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: course.id, overrideAccess: true })

    const courseIds = await getEntitlementCourseIds(userId)
    expect(courseIds).not.toContain(course.id)
    expect(courseIds).toHaveLength(0)
  })

  it("leaves other users' entitlements untouched", async () => {
    const a = await createCourse('D2a', 'Course A')
    const b = await createCourse('D2b', 'Course B')

    const affectedUserId = await createUserWithEntitlements(`user-aff-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [
      a.id,
      b.id,
    ])
    const unaffectedUserId = await createUserWithEntitlements(`user-un-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [
      b.id,
    ])

    await payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: a.id, overrideAccess: true })

    const affected = await getEntitlementCourseIds(affectedUserId)
    expect(affected).toEqual([b.id])

    const unaffected = await getEntitlementCourseIds(unaffectedUserId)
    expect(unaffected).toEqual([b.id])
  })

  it('preserves grantMethod and grantedAt on retained entitlements', async () => {
    const keep = await createCourse('D3keep', 'Keeper')
    const drop = await createCourse('D3drop', 'Dropper')

    const userId = await createUserWithEntitlements(`user-meta-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [
      keep.id,
      drop.id,
    ])

    // Capture original metadata
    const before = (await payload.findByID({
      collection: 'users',
      id: userId,
      overrideAccess: true,
      depth: 0,
    })) as any
    const keptBefore = before.courseEntitlements.find((e: any) => {
      const cid = typeof e.course === 'object' ? e.course?.id : e.course
      return cid === keep.id
    })

    await payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: drop.id, overrideAccess: true })

    const after = (await payload.findByID({
      collection: 'users',
      id: userId,
      overrideAccess: true,
      depth: 0,
    })) as any
    expect(after.courseEntitlements).toHaveLength(1)
    const keptAfter = after.courseEntitlements[0]
    expect(keptAfter.grantMethod).toBe(keptBefore.grantMethod)
    expect(keptAfter.grantedAt).toBe(keptBefore.grantedAt)
  })

  it('no-ops when no users hold an entitlement to the deleted course', async () => {
    const course = await createCourse('D4', 'Unheld Course')
    // No users created for this course
    await expect(
      payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: course.id, overrideAccess: true }),
    ).resolves.toBeDefined()
  })

  it('cleans up all orphan entitlements when > PAGE_SIZE users are affected', async () => {
    const course = await createCourse('D5', 'Popular Course')
    // PAGE_SIZE = 500 in the hook — create enough users to span at least 2 pages
    // (Keep COUNT low enough that the verification loops don't exhaust the test
    // MongoDB connection pool; batched $in queries keep it fast.)
    const COUNT = 100
    const userIds = await Promise.all(
      Array.from({ length: COUNT }, (_, i) =>
        createUserWithEntitlements(`user-d5-${i}-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [course.id]),
      ),
    )

    await payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: course.id, overrideAccess: true })

    // after delete: verify via a single batched query rather than N sequential reads
    // (Sequential per-user findByID calls exhaust the test DB connection pool.)
    const remaining = (await payload.find({
      collection: 'users',
      where: { id: { in: userIds }, 'courseEntitlements.course': { equals: course.id } },
      limit: 0,
      overrideAccess: true,
    })) as any
    expect(remaining.totalDocs).toBe(0)
  }, 180_000)
})

describe('Course delete cascade → orphan entitlement cleanup', () => {
  it('removes entitlement referencing the deleted course', async () => {
    const course = await createCourse('D1', 'Doomed Course')
    const userId = await createUserWithEntitlements(`user-d1-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [course.id])

    await payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: course.id, overrideAccess: true })

    const courseIds = await getEntitlementCourseIds(userId)
    expect(courseIds).not.toContain(course.id)
    expect(courseIds).toHaveLength(0)
  })

  it("leaves other users' entitlements untouched", async () => {
    const a = await createCourse('D2a', 'Course A')
    const b = await createCourse('D2b', 'Course B')

    const affectedUserId = await createUserWithEntitlements(`user-aff-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [
      a.id,
      b.id,
    ])
    const unaffectedUserId = await createUserWithEntitlements(`user-un-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [
      b.id,
    ])

    await payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: a.id, overrideAccess: true })

    const affected = await getEntitlementCourseIds(affectedUserId)
    expect(affected).toEqual([b.id])

    const unaffected = await getEntitlementCourseIds(unaffectedUserId)
    expect(unaffected).toEqual([b.id])
  })

  it('preserves grantMethod and grantedAt on retained entitlements', async () => {
    const keep = await createCourse('D3keep', 'Keeper')
    const drop = await createCourse('D3drop', 'Dropper')

    const userId = await createUserWithEntitlements(`user-meta-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [
      keep.id,
      drop.id,
    ])

    // Capture original metadata
    const before = (await payload.findByID({
      collection: 'users',
      id: userId,
      overrideAccess: true,
      depth: 0,
    })) as any
    const keptBefore = before.courseEntitlements.find((e: any) => {
      const cid = typeof e.course === 'object' ? e.course?.id : e.course
      return cid === keep.id
    })

    await payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: drop.id, overrideAccess: true })

    const after = (await payload.findByID({
      collection: 'users',
      id: userId,
      overrideAccess: true,
      depth: 0,
    })) as any
    expect(after.courseEntitlements).toHaveLength(1)
    const keptAfter = after.courseEntitlements[0]
    expect(keptAfter.grantMethod).toBe(keptBefore.grantMethod)
    expect(keptAfter.grantedAt).toBe(keptBefore.grantedAt)
  })

  it('no-ops when no users hold an entitlement to the deleted course', async () => {
    const course = await createCourse('D4', 'Unheld Course')
    // No users created for this course
    await expect(
      payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: course.id, overrideAccess: true }),
    ).resolves.toBeDefined()
  })

  it('cleans up all orphan entitlements when > PAGE_SIZE users are affected', async () => {
    const course = await createCourse('D5', 'Popular Course')
    // PAGE_SIZE = 500 in the hook — create enough users to span at least 2 pages
    // (Keep COUNT low enough that the verification loops don't exhaust the test
    // MongoDB connection pool; batched $in queries keep it fast.)
    const COUNT = 100
    const userIds = await Promise.all(
      Array.from({ length: COUNT }, (_, i) =>
        createUserWithEntitlements(`user-d5-${i}-${Date.now()}@test.local`, [course.id]),
      ),
    )

    await payload.delete({ collection: 'courses', id: course.id, overrideAccess: true })

    // after delete: verify via a single batched query rather than N sequential reads
    // (Sequential per-user findByID calls exhaust the test DB connection pool.)
    const remaining = (await payload.find({
      collection: 'users',
      where: { id: { in: userIds }, 'courseEntitlements.course': { equals: course.id } },
      limit: 0,
      overrideAccess: true,
    })) as any
    expect(remaining.totalDocs).toBe(0)
  }, 180_000)
})
